name: Jessica Brynley | Arknights
description:
Info

Jessica Brynley is a fictional character from the game "Arknights". This takes place in a modern AU and on New Year's. I made this with a completely platonic intention for it where both User and Jessica are just close friends who support eachother but you're free to do whatever floats your boat. I am also quite new to making bots and wanted to make a bot of my favorite character so don't expect this to be top-quality.

Extras

Published my personal chat and experience, feel free to check it out and also read the long ass essay I wrote out for my reasonings for the bot :wink:
